what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for an image asset named p-10 in the design-source channel, specifically the pitch-deck page 10 JPEG.
observations: The file is a Markdown ledger entry with YAML frontmatter for an image asset.
It references a JPEG blob via blob://b2:8876ceda16e795d4a3c900c72f090771.
Image dimensions w and h are both 0.
The source is design_source_material and the author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r.
The body labels the entry as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-10.jpg'.
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 for an image asset.
It carries a blob URI and an image://design-source address.
It is explicitly marked as design ground-truth.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata.
Follows the ledger naming pattern image__<channel>_<path>.md.
Includes id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, source, author_session, and created timestamp.
concerns: Image dimensions are 0, suggesting missing or unextracted size metadata.
No contextual links to related pages, decks, or design artifacts.
The blob reference is opaque without an accompanying resolution mechanism in this file.
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a pitch-deck image that records provenance and a blob pointer but lacks extracted dimensions or relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height 0?
What visual content does pitch-deck/p-10.jpg contain?
How is the blob URI resolved to the actual image bytes?
What pitch deck or project does this page belong to?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the body states it is a SOURCE design ground-truth for pitch-deck/p-10.jpg, and the frontmatter stores the corresponding asset metadata.
intention_signals: To create a stable, canonical ledger record that points to the original design-source image for pitch-deck page 10 and captures its authorship and creation time.
novelty: The image dimensions (w, h) are recorded as 0, which is unusual for an image asset ledger entry.
contribution: Provides a stable identity, blob pointer, MIME type, source attribution, and timestamp for the pitch-deck page 10 image, making it usable as an asset node in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for the design-source JPEG image pitch-deck/p-10 with a blob pointer, zero dimensions, and ground-truth provenance.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog the original design-source image for pitch-deck page 10 as a canonical, traceable asset.
